title: canthiumera neilgherrensis var. chartacea
intro: Canthiumera neilgherrensis var. chartacea, also known as the Indian staff tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Loganiaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Canthiumera neilgherrensis var. chartacea can be made into decoctions, infusions, or powders, and are often used to create remedies for a range of health conditions.
